meta.title: Fast Forward >> Typing
meta.description: What if you could type as fast as you think? The modern typing tutor for adults.

home.headline: What if you could type as fast as you think?
home.subheadline: We'll help you get there. The modern typing tutor built for adults.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take the free typing test. In 60 seconds you'll know exactly where you stand.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Guided lessons take you step by step to touch typing. At your own pace.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete the course and earn a certificate that proves your typing speed.

features.title: What you get
features.structuredDesc: 30 progressive lessons. Each builds on the last - no guessing, no skipping ahead.
features.guidanceDesc: See exactly which keys give you trouble. Targeted exercises for your specific weak spots.
features.progressDesc: WPM, accuracy, lesson progress - all at a glance. You see exactly how you're improving.
features.outcomesDesc: No endless practice without a goal. Clear milestones, measurable progress, a certificate at the end.

speedTest.title: How fast do you type?
speedTest.desc: Find out. 60 seconds, free, no sign-up required.

certificate.title: Your proof
certificate.desc: Complete the course and receive a certificate with your typing speed. For job applications, employers and your LinkedIn profile.
certificate.certText: has successfully completed the touch typing course

teams.teachersDesc: Typing belongs in the classroom. Manage classes, track progress and integrate typing into your curriculum.
teams.companiesDesc: Faster typing, higher productivity. Set up teams, track results and boost efficiency across your organisation.

finalCta.title: Ready to type faster?
finalCta.desc: Start now - you'll see results after your very first lesson.
